'''''Godendag''''' was a [[cargo ferry]] [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] forces used during the [[Sepan Civil War]]. It was present at the [[Battle of Sepan 8]]. Where [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces under the command of [[Admiral]] [[Harkov]] kidnapped Dimok and [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] leaders, in an attempt to [[Sepan campaign|pacify]] the Civil War, only to find the children of both leaders as part of a treaty to join forces against Harkov forces. Meanwhile Imperial Ace [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] inspected ''Godendag'', along with [[Glaive (cargo ferry)|Glaive]] and [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|Modified corvette]] [[Runka]] during the close of the mission to find that all three ships contained Imperial goods. It was possible he destroyed ''Godendag'' afterwards.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
